title: mentha arvensis subsp. agrestis
intro: Mentha arvensis subsp. agrestis, also known as wild mint or field mint, is a subspecies of the mint plant native to Europe and Western Asia. This herb has been used for centuries for its medicinal properties, including its ability to act as an antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and carminative. The health benefits of Mentha arvensis subsp. agrestis include soothing digestive issues, relieving headaches and nausea, and providing antioxidant properties. It can be prepared in various herbal forms, such as teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
